basic_info.name: SBID International Interior Design Awards | SBID Awards
basic_info.description: The SBID interior design awards is an international celebration of professional excellence across the design industry with a global reputation.

SBID International Design Awards Join the industry’s global interior design awards, recognising the highest standards of design skill and professional excellence around the world 2025 WINNERS ENTER NOW Awards Categories Interior Design SBID Awards Interior Design categories span the specialist commercial and residential sectors, including projects across hospitality spaces, workplace environments, retail stores and healthcare facilities. Read More Interior Fit-Out SBID Awards Fit-Out categories is for the outstanding fit-out of interior design projects across commercial and residential sectors, assessed for standards of completion, execution, finishes and detailing. Read More Product Design SBID Awards Product categories are for interior products, materials and effects ranging from contract or residential furniture, lighting, homeware and accessories to flooring, sanitaryware and surfaces. View Categories The Awards SBID Awards 2025 The 2025 Regional and Global Winners were revealed at the Royal Lancaster London on 24 October! Read More The Judges The judging panel features esteemed industry experts from some of the world’s most innovative companies. Read More Awards Categories The categories span Interior Design, Product Design and Fit-Out across commercial and residential sectors. View Categories Recognising Design Excellence The SBID Awards reward the highest standards of design, skill and mastery across the interior design profession. Read More Event Galleries Explore images from previous SBID International Design Awards Winner’s ceremonies throughout the years. View the gallery Previous Winners Discover winning projects that have represented the best of global interior design, creativity and innovation across the decades.
